page: Microsoft Azure DC48es_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. It does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of external high-performance persistent volumes.

This server type does not feature integrated graphics processing units, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated rendering or GPU-based machine learning workloads. Because there is no local ephemeral storage, all data persistence must be handled via network-attached storage, which introduces a dependency on external storage performance. The instance is classified within the memory-optimized category by the vendor, yet it maintains a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This configuration is suitable for enterprise applications, relational databases, and general-purpose workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and premium storage capabilities without the need for local disk space.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC48es_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEV5 server family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It provides 48 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a resource ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or graphics processing units, but it is fully capable of utilizing Premium Storage for external disk requirements. Positioned as a memory-optimized resource, its balanced compute-to-memory allocation also aligns with general-purpose enterprise standards. The DC48es_v5 is designed for workloads such as relational databases, enterprise application servers, and general-purpose business logic deployments that require dedicated CPU allocation and high-performance external storage integration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC48es_v5 is a DCEV5 family virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC48es_v5 is a DCEV5 virtual machine with 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A dedicated forty-eight core Intel-based virtual machine featuring one hundred ninety-two gigabytes of memory and premium external storage compatibility.
bullet_points: 192.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per vCPU
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external volumes
Zero local storage and no onboard GPU accelerators
Suited for relational databases and enterprise applications
